articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?
articles.description: We have the final 26-player squads that can win the FIFA World Cup, so let's go through all 48 teams and rank where they stand.

images.name: Pochettino: USMNT are moving in a good direction ahead of World Cup
images.caption: Mauricio Pochettino speaks after the USMNT's 3-2 win over Senegal ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: 2026 World Cup: Which 48 teams qualified for the tournament?
articles.description: The race to qualify for the 2026 FIFA World Cup is complete. Here's how it all went down across the globe.

images.name: Sweden celebrate [1296x729]
images.credit: Linnea Rheborg - UEFA/UEFA via Getty Images

images.name: Marcotti: Italy have 'no excuses' for another World Cup failure
images.caption: Gab Marcotti reacts to Italy failing to qualify for a third straight World Cup after losing to Bosnia and Herzegovina on penalties.

articles.headline: 2026 World Cup squads ranked: All 48 national teams that can win this summer
articles.description: We have the final 48 teams that can win the FIFA World Cup this summer. Let's go through them all and rank where they stand.

articles.headline: Nigeria files World Cup complaint to FIFA over Congo DR
articles.description: Nigeria are hoping to revive their hopes of appearing at the 2026 World Cup with complaint to FIFA over the use of at least nine ineligible players by Congo DR.

images.name: DR Congo vs. Nigeria [1296x729]
images.caption: Nigeria were beaten on penalties by DR Congo in their 2026 World Cup playoff.
images.alt: Alex Iwobi of Nigeria in action against Aaron Wan-Bissaka of DR Congo during the FIFA World Cup 26 CAF qualifiers play-offs final match between Nigeria and DR Congo, in Rabat, Morocco, on 16 November 2025

articles.headline: Can Tunisia cause an upset in Group F?
articles.description: Ed Dove discusses Tunisia's chances of progression from Group F as they face tough opponents Japan, The Netherlands and a UEFA play off winner.

keyEvents.text: Joseph Malish (South Sudan) Yellow Card at 39'

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
First Half begins.
Foul by Peter Chan (South Sudan).
Nicolas Jackson (Senegal) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Joseph Malish (South Sudan).
Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt missed. Kalidou Koulibaly (Senegal) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Krépin Diatta with a cross following a set piece situation.

play.text: Kalidou Koulibaly (Senegal) Shot Off Target at 6'

commentary.text: Delay in match because of an injury Keer Majak (South Sudan).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Tito Okello (South Sudan) left footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Valentino Yuel.

play.text: Tito Okello (South Sudan) Shot Off Target at 13'

commentary.text: Atendele Geriga (South Sudan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Nicolas Jackson (Senegal).
Attempt missed. Atendele Geriga (South Sudan) right footed shot from outside the box is too high.

play.text: Geriga Atendele (South Sudan) Shot Off Target at 19'

commentary.text: Foul by Nicolas Jackson (Senegal).
Rashid Toha (South Sudan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Peter Chan (South Sudan).
Krépin Diatta (Senegal) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Nicolas Jackson (Senegal) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Sadio Mané.

play.text: Nicolas Jackson (Senegal) Shot Off Target at 23'

commentary.text: Foul by Benjamin Laku (South Sudan).
Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt saved. Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from very close range is saved in the bottom left corner by Majak Mawith (South Sudan). Assisted by Krépin Diatta with a cross.
Corner, Senegal. Conceded by Majak Mawith.
Delay in match (Senegal).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! South Sudan 0, Senegal 1. Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Iliman Ndiaye with a cross.
Foul by Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal).
Peter Chan (South Sudan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Valentino Yuel (South Sudan).
Édouard Mendy (Senegal) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match because of an injury Édouard Mendy (Senegal).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt saved. Sadio Mané (Senegal) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is saved in the centre of the goal by Majak Mawith (South Sudan). Assisted by Ismaïla Sarr.

play.text: Sadio Mané (Senegal) Shot On Target at 37'

commentary.text: Foul by El Hadji Malick Diouf (Senegal).

play.text: El Hadji Malick Diouf (Senegal) Foul at 38'

commentary.text: Keer Majak (South Sudan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

play.text: El Hadji Malick Diouf (Senegal) Foul at 38'

commentary.text: Foul by Joseph Malish (South Sudan).
Nicolas Jackson (Senegal) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Joseph Malish (South Sudan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

play.text: Joseph Malish (South Sudan) Yellow Card at 39'

commentary.text: Foul by Keer Majak (South Sudan).
Sadio Mané (Senegal) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt saved. Pape Matar Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Majak Mawith (South Sudan). Assisted by Krépin Diatta.

play.text: Pape Matar Sarr (Senegal) Shot On Target at 41'
play.shortText: Pape Matar Sarr Shot On Target

commentary.text: Corner, Senegal. Conceded by Majak Mawith.
Attempt saved. Iliman Ndiaye (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Majak Mawith (South Sudan). Assisted by Krépin Diatta with a cross.

play.text: Iliman Ndiaye (Senegal) Shot On Target at 42'

commentary.text: Attempt blocked. Nicolas Jackson (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Iliman Ndiaye.
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.
Foul by Atendele Geriga (South Sudan).
Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Sadio Mané (Senegal) left footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Ismaïla Sarr.

play.text: Sadio Mané (Senegal) Shot Off Target at 49'

commentary.text: First Half ends, South Sudan 0, Senegal 1.
Second Half begins South Sudan 0, Senegal 1.
Goal! South Sudan 0, Senegal 2. Sadio Mané (Senegal) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Iliman Ndiaye.
Attempt saved. Valentino Yuel (South Sudan) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Édouard Mendy (Senegal). Assisted by Ivan Wani.

play.text: Valentino Yuel (South Sudan) Shot On Target at 48'

commentary.text: Offside, Senegal. Ismaïla Sarr is caught offside.
Attempt blocked. Nicolas Jackson (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Ismaïla Sarr.
Corner, Senegal. Conceded by Rashid Toha.
Corner, Senegal. Conceded by Atendele Geriga.
Goal! South Sudan 0, Senegal 3. Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Nicolas Jackson.
Foul by Sadio Mané (Senegal).
Ivan Wani (South Sudan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Senegal. Conceded by Ivan Wani.
Penalty Senegal. Sadio Mané draws a foul in the penalty area.

play.text: Wani Ivan Adebo (South Sudan) Foul at 58'

commentary.text: Penalty conceded by Ivan Wani (South Sudan) after a foul in the penalty area.

play.text: Wani Ivan Adebo (South Sudan) Foul at 58'

commentary.text: Goal! South Sudan 0, Senegal 4. Nicolas Jackson (Senegal) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, South Sudan. Ajak Riak replaces Tito Okello.
Substitution, South Sudan. David Sebit replaces Joseph Malish.
Substitution, South Sudan. Innocent Ronald replaces Valentino Yuel.
Substitution, South Sudan. Rashid Okocha replaces Ivan Wani.
Substitution, Senegal. Cherif Ndiaye replaces Nicolas Jackson.
Substitution, Senegal. Cheikh Sabaly replaces Sadio Mané.
Substitution, Senegal. Pathé Ciss replaces Ismaïla Sarr.
Foul by Rashid Okocha (South Sudan).
Iliman Ndiaye (Senegal) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt missed. Pape Matar Sarr (Senegal) header from the centre of the box is just a bit too high. Assisted by Iliman Ndiaye with a cross.

commentary.text: Foul by Pathé Ciss (Senegal).
Innocent Ronald (South Sudan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, Senegal. Ilay Camara replaces Iliman Ndiaye.
Substitution, Senegal. Cheikh Niasse replaces Idrissa Gueye.
Delay in match (Senegal).
Substitution, South Sudan. Pap Chol replaces Keer Majak.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! South Sudan 0, Senegal 5. Cherif Ndiaye (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Cheikh Sabaly.
Handball by Peter Chol (South Sudan).
Ajak Riak (South Sudan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Moussa Niakhaté (Senegal).
Offside, Senegal. Pape Matar Sarr is caught offside.

play.text: El Hadji Malick Diouf (Senegal) Offside at 82'

commentary.text: Foul by Moussa Niakhaté (Senegal).
Innocent Ronald (South Sudan) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Cheikh Niasse (Senegal) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

David Sebit (South Sudan) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

commentary.text: Offside, South Sudan. Innocent Ronald is caught offside.
Attempt blocked. Cherif Ndiaye (Senegal) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by El Hadji Malick Diouf with a cross.
Offside, Senegal. Cheikh Sabaly is caught offside.
Fourth official has announced 3 minutes of added time.
Attempt saved. David Sebit (South Sudan) left footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Édouard Mendy (Senegal). Assisted by Pap Chol with a cross.
Second Half ends, South Sudan 0, Senegal 5.
Match ends, South Sudan 0, Senegal 5.
